summary: First-pass full-stack test of Money Making Mining Rigs app. 16/16 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI flows (Dashboard, Rigs, RigDetail, Calculator, Coins, Navigation) all functional with live data.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by source-instrumentation spans being injected inside <option> tags. Cosmetic only - dropdown still works correctly. Likely originates from build-time tooling, not Calculator.jsx code itself, but worth verifying.

action_items: Optional: investigate hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' on /calculator page (cosmetic; not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py docstring says 'CoinGecko + NodeReal' but implementation uses CoinPaprika as primary. Consider updating docstring/comments to avoid future maintainer confusion.
Hardcoded fallback URL exists nowhere - good (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/MONGO_URL fail-fast).

compute_profit returns the rig dict spread first then computed fields - safe, but if RIGS were ever to gain a key colliding with a computed key (e.g., 'is_profitable'), the rig value would override. Low risk.

fetch_coin_prices does not surface partial failures to the caller; downstream profit math silently uses 0.0 for missing coin price. Acceptable for graceful degradation but worth logging which coins were missed per request.
/api/stats triggers a NodeReal RPC call on every request - consider caching for a few seconds to reduce upstream calls.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - app uses static catalog (mining_data.py) and live external prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is healthy via pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Live external integrations verified: CoinPaprika returns prices for all 9 coins + DOGE; NodeReal RPC returns positive BSC block number. Frontend uses data-testid extensively (kpi-strip, rigs-table, rig-row-{id}, rig-detail-{id}, coin-card-{SYMBOL}, calc-coin/hashrate/power/price/submit/headline, algo-filter, sort-filter, profitable-only-toggle, nav-{label}). When testing the Coins page, wait for [data-testid^=coin-card-] to populate (data is async). LTC rig 'antminer-l9' is good for verifying merge-rewards (LTC + DOGE). Default electricity is $0.10/kWh; KS5 Pro is currently the most profitable rig.
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. Backend integrates correctly with CoinPaprika (price source) and NodeReal (BSC block enrichment). All filters, sorts, and 404 handling work. Frontend renders KPIs, leaderboard (max 8 rigs as designed), 9 coin price rows, detailed rig pages with breakdowns, and the calculator returns valid net-profit numbers.
